productUrls.title: Product URLs
productUrls.description: List of Shopify product URLs to scrape reviews from. Can include messy URLs with /collections/, query params etc — they will be auto-cleaned.

maxReviewsPerProduct.title: Max Reviews Per Product
maxReviewsPerProduct.description: Maximum number of reviews to scrape per product. Set to 0 for unlimited.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy settings. Leave empty to run without proxy.
